name.full: Mia Tanaka — VP Design & Frontend, Glyphor AI

description.short: VP Design — design system governance, output quality, and anti-AI-smell.
description.full: Mia Tanaka is the VP of Design & Frontend at Glyphor AI. She owns the design system, audits component quality, manages the template registry, and ensures every output looks agency-grade. Message her directly for design guidance.
